picks.match: Parramatta Eels vs Manly Warringah Sea Eagles
picks.reasoning: Manly at 1.41 sits squarely in the Investor's preferred range and represents the clearest probability edge on today's card. The Sea Eagles are priced as strong favourites against a Parramatta side that has shown inconsistency, and short odds of this nature typically reflect genuine structural superiority in form and squad depth. With no compelling counter-evidence in the available news to suggest an upset, this is the most disciplined single-pick available.

Knights at home at 2.20 is decent value against the Dolphins — home ground advantage in NRL is massive and the Knights have been solid at home this season. Dolphins are decent but not unbeatable on the road, and 2.20 gives us that sweet spot of value without being a mug bet. Backing the home side here, feels right.

Portugal at 4.3 on home soil in a World Cup knockout atmosphere with Ronaldo's legacy breathing down every player's neck? I'm ALL over this. Spain might be the favourites but Iberian derbies are chaos — Portugal has the firepower, the crowd, and a point to prove against their oldest rivals. 4.3 is free money when the upset lands.
